name: sdet-marketplace
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins — skills, agents, and MCP servers for software development and testing workflows.

plugins.name: source-control
plugins.description: Handles git workflow operations — committing staged changes, creating or switching branches, and summarizing diffs.

plugins.name: review-pr
plugins.description: Reviews a pull request for logic errors, security issues, test coverage, and style — producing structured inline feedback.

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Refactors a code block or file to reduce complexity, improve readability, and eliminate redundancy without changing behavior.

plugins.name: add-tests
plugins.description: Generates tests for an existing function or module, covering happy paths, edge cases, and error conditions.

plugins.name: document
plugins.description: Adds or improves inline documentation, docstrings, and README sections for a function, module, or project.

plugins.name: explain
plugins.description: Explains a piece of code, architecture decision, or technical concept in plain language calibrated to the user's apparent expertise level.

plugins.name: grill
plugins.description: Challenges a design, plan, or idea using Socratic questioning and devil's-advocate critique to surface hidden assumptions and weaknesses.

plugins.name: test
plugins.description: Runs quality evaluations against one or all skills using their tests.md fixture files, scoring format compliance and semantic correctness.

plugins.name: plugin-architect
plugins.description: Assists with designing and scaffolding new marketplace plugins (skills, agents, and MCP servers) following marketplace conventions.

plugins.name: agentic-test-creator
plugins.description: Generates Playwright, Selenium, or REST API tests in Python from Jira epics, pull requests, or QA engineer acceptance criteria.

plugins.name: jira
plugins.description: MCP server that exposes Jira epics and stories as callable tools for test generation agents.
